title: Junior Business Development Manager at Ramky Group

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Ramky Group
jsonLd.description:
Ramky Group has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Vijayawada office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Ramky Group:
Ramky Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ramky Group!
